code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """
    Convert a list of Triple objects into a readable sentence.
    Handles multiple triples by creating a clause for each predicate.
    """
    # Mapping from predicate to a simple English clause generator
    phrase_map = {
        "almaMater": lambda s, o: f"{s} studied at {o}",
        "birthDate": lambda s, o: f"{s} was born on {o}",
        "birthName": lambda s, o: f"{s} was originally named {o}",
        "birthPlace": lambda s, o: f"{s} was born in {o}",
        "dateOfRetirement": lambda s, o: f"{s} retired in {o}",
        "occupation": lambda s, o: f"{s} worked as a {o}",
        "status": lambda s, o: f"{s} is {o}",
        "timeInSpace": lambda s, o: f"{s} spent {o} minutes in space",
        "mission": lambda s, o: f"{s} participated in the {o} mission",
        "selectedByNasa": lambda s, o: f"{s} was selected by NASA in {o}",
        "deathDate": lambda s, o: f"{s} died on {o}",
        "nationality": lambda s, o: f"{s} was a citizen of {o}",
        "servedAsChiefOfTheAstronautOfficeIn": lambda s, o: f"{s} served as Chief of the Astronaut Office in {o}",
        "title": lambda s, o: f"{s} held the title of {o}",
        "ribbonAward": lambda s, o: f"{s} received the {o} ribbon",
        "operator": lambda s, o: f"{s} was operated by {o}",
        "backupPilot": lambda s, o: f"{s} had backup pilot {o}",
        "commander": lambda s, o: f"{s} was commanded by {o}",
        "crewMembers": lambda s, o: f"{s} had crew member {o}",
        "representative": lambda s, o: f"{s} was represented by {o}",
        "alternativeName": lambda s, o: f"{s} is also known as {o}",
        "awards": lambda s, o: f"{s} received {o} awards",
        "fossil": lambda s, o: f"{s} is known for the fossil {o}",
        "senators": lambda s, o: f"{s} is represented by senator {o}",
        "part": lambda s, o: f"{s} is part of {o}",
        "partsType": lambda s, o: f"{s} is a {o}",
        "higher": lambda s, o: f"{s} is higher than {o}",
        "isPartOf": lambda s, o: f"{s} is part of {o}",
        "bird": lambda s, o: f"The state bird of {s} is {o}",
        "leader": lambda s, o: f"The leader of {s} is {o}",
        "affiliation": lambda s, o: f"{s} is affiliated with {o}",
        "competeIn": lambda s, o: f"{s} competes in {o}",
        "president": lambda s, o: f"The president of {s} is {o}",
        "award": lambda s, o: f"{s} received the {o}",
        "deathPlace": lambda s, o: f"{s} died in {o}",
        "gemstone": lambda s, o: f"The gemstone of {s} is {o}",
        "mascot": lambda s, o: f"The mascot of {s} is {o}",
        "cosparId": lambda s, o: f"The COSPAR ID of {s} is {o}",
        "utcOffset": lambda s, o: f"The UTC offset of {s} is {o}",
    }

    clauses = []
    for triple in triples:
        generator = phrase_map.get(triple.predicate)
        if generator:
            clause = generator(triple.subject, triple.object)
        else:
            # Fallback generic phrasing
            clause = f"{triple.subject} has {triple.predicate} {triple.object}"
        clauses.append(clause)

    # Join clauses into a single fluent sentence
    if not clauses:
        return ""
    if len(clauses) == 1:
        return clauses[0] + "."
    # Use commas and 'and' before the last clause
    return ", ".join(clauses[:-1]) + ", and " + clauses[-1] + "."

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
